fix_summary: The booking cancellation flow now releases each reserved seat, refreshes flight seat state, and keeps the existing cancelled-booking guard. The regression test confirms seats are freed on cancellation and can be immediately reused. Automated tests passed.
approval_reasons: The implementation is localized to the cancellation flow and preserves existing cancellation semantics aside from seat release.
The added regression test covers the core acceptance criteria: seats are released, flight availability is restored, and a freed seat can be booked again.
Repeat cancellation remains safe under the existing cancelled-booking guard.
